qtype: division with fractions using a given method
tex:
This is Arania's method to divide $213$ by $12\frac{1}{2}$ without using a calculator.
\newline
\[
\begin{aligned}
213 \div 12\frac{1}{2} &= 426 \div 25 \\
&= 852 \div 50 \\
&= 1704 \div 100 \\
&= 17.04
\end{aligned}
\]
Show how to use Arania's method to work out $135 \div 12\frac{1}{2}$ without using a calculator.
\newline

stem.content:
This is Arania's method to divide $213$ by $12\frac{1}{2}$ without using a calculator.
\newline
\[
\begin{aligned}
213 \div 12\frac{1}{2} &= 426 \div 25 \\
&= 852 \div 50 \\
&= 1704 \div 100 \\
&= 17.04
\end{aligned}
\]
Show how to use Arania's method to work out $135 \div 12\frac{1}{2}$ without using a calculator.
\newline

_rawBody:
This is Arania's method to divide $213$ by $12\frac{1}{2}$ without using a calculator.
\[
\begin{aligned}
213 \div 12\frac{1}{2} &= 426 \div 25 \\
&= 852 \div 50 \\
&= 1704 \div 100 \\
&= 17.04
\end{aligned}
\]
Show how to use Arania's method to work out $135 \div 12\frac{1}{2}$ without using a calculator.

\Answerspace[2cm]
\Marks{2}

qtype: angle calculations

\hline

 because
